golden_glove.note: FIFA Golden Glove winner — a record seven clean sheets across the tournament, flawless behind Spain's title-winning defence
Perfect group stage at 41 — Mexico's veteran shot-stopper
11 saves in the final alone kept Argentina in it to extra time — world-class in the biggest moment, on the losing side
Solid throughout Brazil's run to the knockout stage
Penalty-save specialist, key behind Portugal's composure in tight matches
Colombia's unsung defensive hero through the group stage
Anchored France's run to the semi-finals
Kept England tight en route to a third-place finish
A heroic 0-0 vs Spain in MD1 — Cape Verde's standout individual performer
2018 Golden Glove winner; big-tournament pedigree showed again

golden_ball.note: FIFA Golden Ball winner — anchored Spain's midfield control all tournament, the engine behind a run to a second World Cup title
Runner-up — carried Argentina to the final in what was widely expected to be his last World Cup, before Spain's defence shut it down on the day
Third — also won the Golden Boot outright with 10 goals, including a record-breaking 22nd career World Cup goal in the third-place match

best_young_player.note: FIFA Young Player of the Tournament — the 19-year-old centre-back was a rock at the back of Spain's title-winning defence, joining a list of past winners that includes Mbappé, Müller and Enzo Fernández
